content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-021)

## Closest-to-completion (prioritize)
1. **B1 — `exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen` germ-naturality (OcOfD.lean L2284).**
   The single deep affine sorry; all order-transport / Krull-dim / instance substrate is sorry-free.
   Diagram chase: transport `r ∈ Γ(W.toScheme,⊤)` → `s ∈ Γ(C.left,W)` via `IsOpenImmersion.ΓIsoTop W.ι`
   (`opensRange W.ι = W`), then `germToFunctionField C.left W s = functionFieldIso W (algebraMap _ _ r) = f`.
   Candidate tools: `LocallyRingedSpace.restrictStalkIso_hom_eq_germ`,
   `Scheme.Modules.germ_restrictStalkNatIso_hom_app`. **Dispatch as its own focused lane** (~50-100 lines).
   NOT a Mathlib gap.

2. **Adopt the prover's FORWARD-sheaf-morphism restructure for the section iso + naturality.**
   Build `toModuleKSheaf C ⟶ carrierSheaf 0` (component = `germToFunctionField` into carrier,
   naturality = identity-on-K(C)); prove each component iso (inj `germToFunctionField_injective` +
   surj = glued B1 helper); `NatIso` then automatic → both `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf`
   and `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` derive by `.app U`, naturality FREE. This dissolves the
   currently-gated naturality sorry (L2331) into a provable identity. Sequence: B1 first, then this.
   Remaining sub-pieces: general-U affine-cover gluing (`carrierSet_mono`) + U=⊥ corner (zero k̄-module).

## Coverage debt (planner: author blueprint prose)
- **NEW unmatched Lean decl:** `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.WeilDivisor.sheafOf.exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen`
  (OcOfD.lean L2245). No blueprint entry. Statement: affine algebraic Hartogs (Hartshorne II.6.3A,
  reverse inclusion). Depends on `chart_mem_range_of_forall_order_nonneg`, `order_eq_order_restrict`,
  `Scheme.PrimeDivisor.{ofOpen,equivOpen}`, `functionFieldIso`, `krullDim_curve_le_one`,
  `Order.krullDim_le_of_strictMono`. Fold into the proof environment of
  `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` (its affine arm) or give a dedicated `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses`.
- Pre-existing unmatched (out-of-cone, no owed blueprint per ARCHON_MEMORY): all
  `Cohomology/*`, `Genus0*`, `ProjectiveLineBar*`, `HModule'/cechCochain/cechCohomology` lean_aux nodes.
  Also still-unpinned cone helpers `sheafOf.carrierSet_zero_eq`, `sheafOf.coe_eqToHom_of_submodule_eq`
  (prior-iter helpers) — low priority, fold into existing OcOfD proof blocks.

## Stale-comment cleanup (route to next OcOfD prover — comment-only, review cannot edit .lean)
- OcOfD.lean module header: claims only 2 remaining sorries; calls all 4 pinned decls "Tier-3 honest
  typed sorry" though `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero` are sorry-free. Update to 3 cone sorries (B1, section-iso,
  naturality) + 1 off-cone (L772 singlePoint).
- OcOfD.lean L2424/2449: still call the now-closed `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` "the sole
  deep gap (honest typed sorry)" — the whole cokernel chain is sorry-free (closed iter-020).
- OcOfD.lean L887: refers to a "L635 finrank sorry" closed in iter-011/014.
- WeilDivisor.lean header: describes a "file-skeleton with sorry bodies" though 7/9 pins are proved.

## Process note
- S3 did NOT close this iter (plan targeted full closure; prover took the planned reversal: fine-grain
  section-iso into affine helper + gluing). This is in-plan re-decomposition, not a stall — net −1 cone
  sorry with the hardest piece (B1) isolated and its surroundings verified. Over the original 2-iter
  estimate (now 6), but the overrun was the resolved valuation stall (iters 017-019). Recommend the plan
  agent treat B1 + the forward-morphism restructure as the two-step closing sequence; do NOT re-target
  the whole bridge as one monolithic lane.
- Do NOT re-flag the valuation/Hartogs inverse as a Mathlib gap — `chart_mem_range_of_forall_order_nonneg`
  is landed and consumed; the residual is diagram-chase + sheaf-gluing volume only.
